plugins.name: salesforce-essentials
plugins.description: ESSENTIALS: Essential Salesforce operations for RevOps practitioners - 12 core agents including discovery, queries, basic metadata management, data operations, reports/dashboards, and permission basics. Perfect for individual admins and small teams.

plugins.name: hubspot-essentials
plugins.description: ESSENTIALS: Essential HubSpot operations for RevOps practitioners - 10 core agents including property management, contact/pipeline operations, basic workflows, analytics, and data hygiene. Perfect for individual admins and small teams.

plugins.name: cross-platform-essentials
plugins.description: ESSENTIALS: Essential cross-platform utilities - 4 core agents including basic diagram generation, single-document PDF creation, implementation planning, and instance management. Perfect for documentation and basic planning needs.
